name: HubSpot

composio_registry_match.name: HubSpot
composio_registry_match.description: HubSpot is an inbound marketing, sales, and customer service platform integrating CRM, email automation, and analytics to facilitate lead nurturing and seamless customer experiences

description: An agentic customer platform and CRM that unifies marketing, sales, service, content, and data tools for businesses.
notes: Composio lists 244 tools for HubSpot. HubSpot deprecated legacy API keys in favor of Private App Access Tokens (Token) and OAuth2.
